result.stderr:
Google.Cloud.Tools.DocUploader 0.3.0+2633a05e9a6267bf7996f3bedb2090b1315cc546
Copyright 2025 Google LLC

  --documentation-path    Required.

  --staging-bucket        (Default: docs-resources) The bucket to upload the
                          staged documentation to.

  --credentials           Path to the credentials file to use for Google Cloud
                          Storage. When not specified, or explicitly specified
                          as 'adc', application default credentials are used.

  --metadata-file         Path to the docs.metadata file. The path must be
                          relative to the CWD.

  --destination-prefix    Prefix to include when uploading tar file. A - will be
                          added after the prefix, if there is one.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

commands.payload:
Google.Cloud.Tools.DocUploader 0.3.0+2633a05e9a6267bf7996f3bedb2090b1315cc546
Copyright 2025 Google LLC

  --documentation-path    Required.

  --staging-bucket        (Default: docs-resources) The bucket to upload the
                          staged documentation to.

  --credentials           Path to the credentials file to use for Google Cloud
                          Storage. When not specified, or explicitly specified
                          as 'adc', application default credentials are used.

  --metadata-file         Path to the docs.metadata file. The path must be
                          relative to the CWD.

  --destination-prefix    Prefix to include when uploading tar file. A - will be
                          added after the prefix, if there is one.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
